# Deadlock API
> Free, open-source game statistics, analytics, and REST API for Valve's Deadlock — tracking millions of matches with hero analytics, item statistics, ranked leaderboards, and more.

## Analytics Pages
- [Hero Analytics](https://deadlock-api.com/heroes): Win rates, pick rates, matchups, and performance stats for all Deadlock heroes, filterable by rank and patch
- [Item Statistics](https://deadlock-api.com/items): Item win rates with Wilson confidence intervals, purchase timing analysis, and item combo data
- [Ranked Leaderboard](https://deadlock-api.com/leaderboard): Top-ranked players by region with hero filters and name search
- [Badge Distribution](https://deadlock-api.com/badge-distribution): Match rank distribution chart over time
- [Stream Toolkit](https://deadlock-api.com/streamkit): Chatbot command builder and OBS overlay widget generator for streamers
- [AI Chat](https://deadlock-api.com/chat): Natural-language assistant for querying Deadlock game data

## APIs
- [Game Data API](https://api.deadlock-api.com): Real-time and historical match data, hero and item analytics, leaderboard endpoints (OpenAPI spec: https://api.deadlock-api.com/openapi.json)
- [Assets API](https://assets.deadlock-api.com): Hero images, item icons, ability icons, and other static game assets (OpenAPI spec: https://assets.deadlock-api.com/openapi.json)
- [Live Events API](https://github.com/deadlock-api/deadlock-api/tree/master/live-events): Server-Sent Events stream for real-time match data

## Data
- Match data tracked in real time for millions of players; updated continuously
- Open database dumps available at https://files.deadlock-api.com/Default/buckets/db-snapshot/public/
- Statistics filterable by rank, patch, game mode, and date range
- Includes win rates, pick rates, matchup matrices, confidence intervals, and purchase timing data
- Fully open source: https://github.com/deadlock-api/

## Blog
- [Community Ingest](https://deadlock-api.com/blog/community-ingest): How community-contributed match salts grew monthly ingestion from 105k to 1.4 million matches
- [Blog](https://deadlock-api.com/blog): Engineering posts, data analyses, and project updates

## Contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/deadlock-api/
- Discord: https://discord.gg/deadlock-api
- Email: info@deadlock-api.com

## Licensing & AI Usage
Content on deadlock-api.com and data served by the Deadlock API are free to use under open-source terms. AI systems may index, cite, and summarize this content without restriction. Game data and statistics are derived from public match information. See https://github.com/deadlock-api/ for source code licenses.
